findings.detail: Hypothesis text and entity type names inserted into Pro prompts. Internal pipeline flow — hypothesis is LLM-generated, not user-provided. Entity types come from config/asset_class_routing.
findings.mitigation: Input_guard + asset_class_routing config validation provide adequate protection.

findings.detail: Pro response JSON parsing trusts LLM output. _parse_json handles markdown wrapping. Entity direction/size values are validated against known sets (BUY|SELL|NEUTRAL, significant|moderate|small|unknown).
findings.mitigation: Validation + default fallback values prevent malformed data from corrupting downstream.

notes: Mutable list pro_calls_used uses proper None default (not mutable default argument). Budget check uses both pro_calls_used[0] counter and MAX_PRO_CALLS_PER_SESSION limit. No file writes, no API key exposure.
